system_description: Lantern AI is an intelligent recruiter that transforms the way companies hire. Acting as a conversational AI, Lantern conducts the first round of candidate interviews—asking tailored questions based on the job description and CV, gathering deeper insights than a résumé alone can provide. Available 24/7, it removes scheduling hassles, screens for red flags, ranks candidates for volume hiring, and delivers richer candidate profiles to hiring teams. Lantern doesn’t just assess talent—it also allows candidates to ask questions, making recruitment more efficient, engaging, and reciprocal.
